transcript.text: Ah, kindly give a straight reply.
Does God exist or not?
Yes or no?
If yes, how best to realise Him in this life?
Is that a lovely question?
Kindly give a straight reply.
Does God exist or not?
Yes or no?
And if yes, how best to realise Him in this life?
Man, throughout history, from the ancient Greeks, from the ancient Sumerians, have this
idea of God, right?
I am not at all sure whether in the Upanishads and whether they mention God at all, or is
it related to invention?
So what is God?
We are investigating, I am not attacking God, I am not denying God, but we are investigating
whether there is such a thing as God.
Who invented it, God?
Did God invent us?
Did God create us?
Right?
God, who is omnipresent, potent, omniscience, eternal, merciful, justice, all goodness
– that is your concept of God.
And if you say he has created us, then we are part of his image, we are part of him
– that is, we are omniscient, generous, loving, right?
And eternal, right, are we, or we think we are?
You understand my question?
If God created you, he must be an extraordinary entity, because he wants you to lead a terrible
life.
You understand my question?
If God made you, why are you like this?
You must be extraordinary human beings, isn't you?
Beautiful, full of joy, excitement, full of delight, but you are not.
So either you have created God, or God has created you.
But if you examine very closely, you have created God, right?
In India there are about – I was told there are about 300,000 Gods and more, you may
say – every local person has his own God.
So sirs, we have created God.
See the irony of it – thought has created God, and then thought worship the image which
thought has created, which is to worship oneself and call it God.
You understand all this?
The better part of you is God, right?
I wonder if you understand this.
First of all, let's be clear.
Have you created God, the local Gods around the corner, or the local Gods in Rome, or in
Tirupati, or whatever?
You have created them, haven't you?
You are so very uncertain, aren't you?
So frightened.
If you say, we have created, then you are scared, stiff, because you have created out
of your fear that, out of your fear you want security, right?
You want safety, you want to feel there is somebody looking after you, because you are
afraid, you follow?
So you create that, and then worship that.
Just see what you are doing, going to Tirupati and putting all your money into the bag,
do you think God's wants your money?
Sir, look at it all.
You are nothing but to offer but money, garlands, frustrations, rituals, right?
You are nothing else to offer.
Have you realised the tragedy of the Sirs?
If you love, not God, that is very easy to love God, because it is so in abstraction
it has not much meaning, but if you love it, that very love is God, if that very love
is sacred, you won't go outside to look for God, you understand all the Sirs?
And the questioner wants to know, if I believe in God, I don't.
Because God is not something created by man, there is such thing as eternity, which is
to be outside of time.
Right, sir?
For that you must have a mind, a heart that is completely free from all the burdens
of life, right?
From your vanity, your arrogance, your selfishness, you follow, sir?
And we say, I am not capable of it, tell us what to do.
You are back in the cycle, somebody to tell you what to do.
Sir, you are in a jungle, you have to walk through it by yourself, right?
And for that you need vitality and vigor and strength, not in belief, in God, in goodness.
Belief has no place where truth is concerned.
Right?
Right?
And what is art from Sirs?
Huh?
Art from which we have been hearing even Annie Besson in the past, art from Sirs.
Who is that?
The conscience inside each of us.
Who is art from?
Is conscience Atman?
What they call as soul, what they call as soul, so, which soul, the soul of a shoo,
so, I don't know what you are talking about.
At last you are all getting excited, because your belief is being attacked.
You are not meeting the challenge, but you are resisting it.
You think there is something inside you, which is permanent, which is the light of God,
which is nameless, etc., call it Atman, soul, light, whatever you like to call it,
and there is inside you, in your conscience, in your brain, in your mind, something which
is not worldly, which is not a thought.
Right?
You believe that, don't you?
Yes, sir?
Yes, sir?
Why?
How do you know?
Just believe, believe, believe, believe, what kind of brains have you, sirs?
Don't you want to find out?
Don't you want to investigate into the truth of this matter, whether there is soul,
Atman, whatever you like to call it, don't you?
Just believe, if you believe, what value has it?
See, I suppose I believe I have got Atman or whatever it is, super Atman, I'll call it.
I believe in that, and what value has it?
In my daily life, what part does it play?
I am miserable, I am confused, I am lonely, I am anxious, in agony, what is the point
am I having a belief in Atman?
If I am free from all that, completely, then I shall find out.
But suppose I am, if only it becomes so childish, for God's sake, and we are all grown
up people, jobs, children, wives.
All right, what, what, what, what, sir, I don't understand you, sir, what is it?
Ramara Maharishi, and who?
All right, sir, what about them?
What about them?
So they do their stupid life and they are doing it to something and to dedicate yourself and to try to do something to them.
A hundred and a half of that they know you like answers.
Because we have been in this movement and the superstition of the world.
It is possible that it's not to leave the past.
It's just to keep you thinking that you can back answer.
Being in a teacher world, I think we are just really needed a number of people in the show,
but that's the right definition.
All the people, the real religions, yes.
You'll be just to argue, sir.
Would you forget all these people, including Ramana Maharshi,
what if the other gentleman was?
Would you forget them?
What value have they life to you?
You have your life to live, not their life.
God, what kind of thing?
And when the people say they have attained, whatever they have attained, how do you know?
You want to say it there, some time less it every day.
I have said it, sir.
Don't believe it.
It is not fair, I know, it is not quite fair.
But, sir, just listen.
So truth is that it is something, it cannot experience.
It cannot be told to you.
Word is not that.
But if you live on words, it's that.
You understand?
The word is not that, like the word tree is not the tree.
I can describe eternity, blah, blah, blah.
But the word is not that.
But we are satisfied with the word.
Right, sir?
You love with your heart, with your mind, with everything that you have,
you love somebody.
And you tell me of that love.
And I accept the words
but the flower isn't there, the perfume isn't there.
You see, sirs,
you have leaders, religious leaders and political leaders.
I don't know why.
Why you have leaders at all,
Ramakrishna, whatever cool gurus that you have had,
one after the other.
Right?
This country is full of them.
And why do you follow?
You understand?
If once you realise that you are responsible entirely for yourself,
that you are in a jungle, literally in a jungle,
where you have to make your own way out,
there is nobody to lead you.
Then you find it all this.
The example is the books, everything,
because you've got vitality, strength, and go through.
But the moment you depend on leaders, you've become weak.
If once you realise it in your heart, not just intellectually,
then you are a man, human being,
free to walk straight.
But we don't want all that.
Sir, it's so simple when you think of it all.
